name: RABBIT-BACKLOG-1
title: B/B filing scripts commit to active branch without main-branch check
description: file-bug.sh and file-backlog-item.sh auto-commit to whatever branch is currently checked out, with no guard that the caller is on main. Filing on a non-main branch silently misplaces the metadata commit.

history.note: [skip-vet: Evaluated inline against spec and TDD report: invariant implemented and test-green confirmed] Branch guard added to file-backlog-item.sh and file-bug.sh; TDD cycle complete
